title: Shorty (disambiguation)
content:
'''Shorty''' can refer to:

*[[99/Legends|99]], a malformed [[Cloning/Legends|clone]] nicknamed "Shorty" by his [[Clone trooper/Legends|brothers]]
*[[Den Dhur]], nicknamed "Shorty" by [[Jax Pavan]]
*[[Shorty (droid)|Shorty]], a [[Droid/Legends|droid]]
*[[Shorty (Jawa)|Shorty]], a [[Jawa/Legends|Jawa]]
*[[Short Round]], Doctor [[Indiana Jones|Jones]]' assistant, nicknamed "Shorty"
*[[Franklin Scott]], nicknamed "Shorty"

{{Disambig}}
